nuggets.idea_one_liner: Building your identity on anything that can 'get hit by a bus' is a recipe for total internal destruction.
nuggets.why_it_hits: High stop power through a jarring but extremely clear analogy for the vulnerability of building life on human sources.
nuggets.audience_fit: Men in stable but vulnerable relationships

value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Identifies God as the only non-mortal foundation

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: Where you build your identity is in your most important relationship... if you lose your family, then who are you? ... Is [God] ever going to just maybe get hit by a bus and die? No. And if he did... we're in trouble.
proof_anchor_lines: God won't get hit by a bus
Foundation that doesn't disappear when the relationship does
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: The one accident that will destroy your entire sense of being.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: Are you building a life or a glass house?
nuggets.first_step_seed: Audit your life: Which part of your identity would survive if your primary human relationship ended today? Write down what's left.
